title: verhuellia reniformis
intro: Verhuellia reniformis is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is native to tropical Africa. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Verhuellia reniformis is known to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it is also used as a poultice to apply directly to the skin for wound healing.
